description: Storybook linker — exports Figma component data via figma-cli and maps it to Storybook stories.

storybook.stories_path: TODO: path to your Storybook stories directory (e.g. 'src/stories')

env.STORYBOOK_STORIES_PATH: TODO: absolute or relative path to Storybook stories

notes: figma-cli connects via local CDP daemon — no Figma API token required.
Run 'figma-cli connect' (Yolo mode) before invoking this agent.
